    "Frayed and burned webbing on fall protection equipment"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately remove the damaged fall protection equipment from service",
    "Tag the equipment as unusable and destroy or discard it to prevent accidental reuse",
    "Replace with compliant, inspected fall protection gear"
  ],
  "rationale": "Frayed or burned webbing on fall protection equipment severely compromises its structural integrity and load-bearing capacity. Under OSHA 1926 Subpart M and 1910.140, personal fall protection equipment must be inspected before each use for wear, damage, and other deterioration, and defective equipment must be immediately removed from service.",
